title: Light-filled family home with park frontage
description:
A bright, well-planned home directly opposite parkland. Open living flows to an alfresco and low-maintenance yard, with a separate lounge and a dedicated study nook. Walk to schools, the town centre and bus routes.

Moments to the Edgars Creek trail and a short drive to the freeway.

title: Stylish townhouse moments from the train
description: Low-maintenance living with quality finishes throughout. Generous bedrooms upstairs, a sleek kitchen and a private courtyard. Ideal first home or investment, walking distance to Craigieburn Station.

title: Brand-new four-bedroom on a corner block
description: Modern family living with space to grow. Multiple living zones, a designer kitchen with butler's pantry, and a master suite with walk-in robe and ensuite. Quality build on a sought-after corner allotment.

title: Neat three-bedroom rental close to shops
description: Comfortable family home available now. Open-plan living, a well-equipped kitchen and a secure backyard. Close to shops, schools and parks. Pets considered on application.

title: Modern two-bed apartment with city access
description: Bright, secure apartment steps from the station and Pacific Epping. Open living opens to a balcony, with a stone kitchen and built-in robes. Perfect lock-and-leave.

title: Sold in 7 days — immaculate single-storey
description: A fantastic result for our vendors. Strong buyer interest and a smooth campaign delivered a sale in just one week. Thinking of selling nearby? Get in touch for a free appraisal.
